description: Classic tapering monk-strap shoes from provogue for men with a refined, stacked heel. The stylish detail and the slim silhouette gives a fun vibe to this formal shoe. Wear this with tonal, structured trousers and a crisp shirt and a leather jacket. Upper Genuine leather upper with reinforced overlay on the heel for durability Slip on styling with elasticated inserts on the sides of the tongue for ease of wear A strap with cut-out pattern across the mid-foot and forefoot for a customised Fit Leather lining Soft sock-liner for instep comfort Brand badge on the lateral side of the mid-foot, as a part of the strap buckle Mid-sole Shock absorbing EVA mid-sole Out-sole TPR out-sole with a stacked heel Textured, metallic toned grooves on the forefoot and heel for grip and traction Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
